event: Altered renal function with creatinine at 92 mg/l
Renal abscess 97 × 96 mm ruptured into intraperitoneal cavity
Antibiotic therapy with ceftriaxone plus metronidazole
Placement of right double J stent
Urinary tract infection due to Pseudomonas Aeruginosa
Antibiotic therapy continued after culture results
Apyrexia on the second postoperative day
Chronic renal failure with creatinine plateau at 20 mg/l
Patient discharged on day 10 on oral antibiotics
Four-week follow-up CT scan showed regression of air bubbles
Double J catheter removed within six weeks
